TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Paiwan Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://pwn.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_pwn, title = {Paiwan Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://pwn.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Sinaseljang a tasi ita a kinadjemadjemaq a qemaljup. Tjautsikel a Hans Christian Andersen. I 1837 kemasi, tja pinuljacengan a kinaqatiyan tu √ßocuk nu qemaljup. A kinadjemadjemaq seman tua aljak a sinaseljang na tasi, nua pakatazan tua kina tasi a qinaljan, tua marekaq a kemasi nua ta caucau a qaljay. == minamilingan ==
S.PHON: sinas…ô éaŇč a tasi ita a kina…Č…ôma…Č…ômaq a q…ôma éup. ¶autsik…ô…≠ a hans ¶hristian and…ôrs…ôn. i **** k…ômasi, ¶a pinu éa ¶…ôŇčan a kinaqatijan tu *u ¶uk nu q…ôma éup. a kina…Č…ôma…Č…ômaq s…ôman tua a éak a sinas…ô éaŇč na tasi, nua pakatazan tua kina tasi a qina éan, tua mar…ôkaq a k…ômasi nua ta ¶au ¶au a qa éaj. == minami…≠iŇčan ==
S.FORM: Sinaseljang a tasi ita a kinadjemadjemaq a qemaljup. Tjautsikel a Hans Christian Andersen. I 1837 kemasi, tja pinuljacengan a kinaqatiyan tu √ßocuk nu qemaljup. A kinadjemadjemaq seman tua aljak a sinaseljang na tasi, nua pakatazan tua kina tasi a qinaljan, tua marekaq a kemasi nua ta caucau a qaljay. == minamilingan ==
S.PHON: sinas…ô éaŇč a tasi ita a kina…Č…ôma…Č…ômaq a q…ôma éup. ¶autsik…ô…≠ a hans ¶hristian and…ôrs…ôn. i **** k…ômasi, ¶a pinu éa ¶…ôŇčan a kinaqatijan tu *u ¶uk nu q…ôma éup. a kina…Č…ôma…Č…ômaq s…ôman tua a éak a sinas…ô éaŇč na tasi, nua pakatazan tua kina tasi a qina éan, tua mar…ôkaq a k…ômasi nua ta ¶au ¶au a qa éaj. == minami…≠iŇčan ==
